utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items explicitly. Each one is detailed with relevant subfields and costs: (1) property includes type, bedrooms, bathrooms, location, price, taxes, etc.; (2) financing includes method, amount, currency, and documentation; (3) legal_services includes service_name, cost, duration, and status; (4) moving_services includes cost, currency, packing/unpacking, and accessibility_support; (5) setup_services includes detailed breakdown of utility_setup, processing_fees, and property_survey with costs and statuses; (6) total_budget includes all individual and total costs with currency and payment schedule. All items are fully specified according to the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution includes a detached house in Burlington suburban area priced at CAD 650,000 with 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, matching the 'Family House' option in the ground truth (same price, size, and description). The financing method used is 'cash_purchase', which corresponds to 'Cash Purchase' under purchase_financing. The legal service used is 'Premium Legal Package'.
